description: Establish a real Prisma migration history. The 48-model schema (packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma, postgresql + pgvector) is currently applied only via `prisma db push --force-reset` (scripts/db-reset.ts:16) with NO committed migrations, so there is no safe production schema evolution or rollback path.
steps: Generate a baseline migration: `prisma migrate dev --name baseline` (or `prisma migrate diff` from an empty DB to schema.prisma) and commit the result under packages/database/prisma/migrations/.
Handle the pgvector extension in the baseline migration (CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector) since Prisma may not emit it automatically.
Update package scripts: keep db:reset for local, but make db:migrate run `prisma migrate deploy`; document that production uses migrate deploy, not db push.
Update scripts/db-reset.ts to optionally run migrate deploy instead of force-reset for non-dev environments.
Add a CI check (or extend verify-state) that fails if schema.prisma changes without a corresponding new migration (prisma migrate diff --exit-code).
acceptance_criteria: packages/database/prisma/migrations/ contains a committed baseline migration that reproduces the full 48-model schema
pgvector extension is created by the migration
db:migrate uses prisma migrate deploy; production no longer relies on db push --force-reset
